text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega doesn't show up for training. After
some looking around, I finally find her in the
library.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I call out to her but notice that she's fast asleep.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer? What are you... doing here?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was searching for information to help with my
races... and I must have dozed off.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I'll be more careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm slightly concerned that she's
overworking herself, I give her a fair and proper
warning.
